'''Gyuel''' was the central [[Blue giant/Legends|blue giant]] [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Gyuel system]], located in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

{{Star-stub}}
